title: messages: sha256_hex validator accepts uppercase hex but reassembly computes lowercase
description: deserialize_sha256_hex uses is_ascii_hexdigit() which accepts A-F as well as a-f, but the CLI computes lowercase hex via {b:02x}. A FileHeader with an uppercase sha256_hex passes deserialization but always fails the integrity check at reassembly time — the file transfer permanently fails with a false hash-mismatch error. Fix: require only lowercase hex in the validator, or normalize to lowercase before storing.
